initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN connected c ON m.molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_id = c.bond_id)
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O' AND b.bond_type = 'single'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN connected c ON m.molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = c.atom_id)
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O' AND b.bond_type = 'single'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
      AND m.molecule_id IN (
          SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
          FROM bond b
          WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
      )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN connected c ON m.molecule_id = c.atom_id
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O' AND b.bond_type = 'single'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    INNER JOIN connected c ON m.molecule_id = c.atom_id OR m.molecule_id = c.atom_id2
    INNER JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O' AND b.bond_type = 'single'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN connected c ON m.molecule_id = c.atom_id
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O' AND b.bond_type = 'single'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;
